title: cerastium purpurascens subsp. purpurascens
intro: Cerastium purpurascens subsp. purpurascens is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the toad rush plant, belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Cerastium purpurascens subsp. purpurascens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The plant can be prepared into herbal infusions, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal agent.
